name: BB:FalsePositive: DNS Server False Positive Events
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive QIDs that occur to or from DNS-based servers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: DNS Servers building block.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: DNS Server False Positive Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (4251341) DOS:DDNSF
when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: DNS Servers, BB:HostReference: DNS Servers
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: DNS Server False Positive Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event QID is one of the following (4251341) DOS:DDNSF
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: DNS Servers, BB:HostReference: DNS Servers
